```{r}
  geom_sf(data = seis_alone, aes(fill = se_mean_plotting), size = 2, pch = 21) +
  scale_fill_continuous(high = "darkred", low = "white",
                      name = "SE of regression (m)")+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(rect = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "left")
```

Incorporating error from measurements and regression
```{r incorporating both sources of error}

## Confidence Interval
pred <- predict(fit, newdata, interval = "confidence") %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  tibble()
# 95% chance that depth is between upper and lower values
pred %>% 
  mutate(depth = exp(fit),
         depth_min = exp(lwr),
         depth_max = exp(upr))

## Prediction Interval
# prediction interval much wider than confidence interval
pred <- predict(fit, newdata, interval = "prediction") %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  tibble()
# 95% chance that depth is between upper and lower values
pred %>% 
  mutate(depth = exp(fit),
         depth_min = exp(lwr),
         depth_max = exp(upr))


## Use predict on min, max f0
seis_f0_prepped <- seis_f0 %>% 
  filter(grilla_number != 114) %>% 
  mutate(f0_max = h_v_max + sd,
         f0_min = h_v_max - sd)
# f0 smaller = deeper depth
max_prediction <- 
  seis_f0_prepped %>% 
  rename(freq = "f0_min") %>% 
predict(model_lm, ., interval = "prediction") %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  tibble() %>% 
  mutate(depth = exp(fit),
         depth_min = exp(lwr),
         depth_max = exp(upr)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(depth_max)
# f0 bigger = shallower depth
min_prediction <- 
  seis_f0_prepped %>% 
  rename(freq = "f0_max") %>% 
predict(model_lm, ., interval = "prediction") %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  tibble() %>% 
  mutate(depth = exp(fit),
         depth_min = exp(lwr),
         depth_max = exp(upr)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(depth, depth_min)
  
# combine all into a final range of values including both sources of error
all_errors <- seis_f0_prepped %>% 
  bind_cols(min_prediction, max_prediction) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4329) %>% 
  st_transform(crs1)
```
```{r}
ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  geom_sf(data = w3_outline, color = "grey", fill = NA, alpha = 0.3, lwd = 2)+
  geom_sf(data = w3_stream, colour = "#9AC0CD", lwd = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = all_errors, aes(fill = depth), size = 2, pch = 21) +
  scale_fill_continuous(high = "purple4", low = "white",
                      name = "Estimated Depth (m)")+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(rect = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "left")

ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  geom_sf(data = w3_outline, color = "grey", fill = NA, alpha = 0.3, lwd = 2)+
  geom_sf(data = w3_stream, colour = "#9AC0CD", lwd = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = all_errors, aes(fill = depth_max), size = 2, pch = 21) +
  scale_fill_continuous(high = "darkred", low = "white",
                      name = "Max depth (m)",
                      limits = c(0, 25))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(rect = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "left")

ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  geom_sf(data = w3_outline, color = "grey", fill = NA, alpha = 0.3, lwd = 2)+
  geom_sf(data = w3_stream, colour = "#9AC0CD", lwd = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = all_errors, aes(fill = depth_min), size = 2, pch = 21) +
  scale_fill_continuous(high = "darkblue", low = "white",
                      name = "Min depth (m)"
                      #,limits = c(0, 25)
                      )+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(rect = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "left")
```



```{r krig-with-split}
# Krig with validation split
# input params
spatial_resolution <- 1 # meters
split <- 0.7 # 80/20 for example
number_of_classes <- 5 # number of classes for stratified random sampling
set.seed(1)

# define area for interpolation
grd <- st_bbox(w3_outline) |>
  st_as_stars(dx = spatial_resolution)

# replace depth with each monte carlo realization
first_elements_sapply <- sapply(results, "[[", 1)

all_sources <-
rbind(
  seis %>% 
    mutate(depth = first_elements_sapply) %>% 
group_by(lat, long) %>%       
  #remove duplicate locations by taking the mean
  summarise(mean_depth = mean(depth), n_coords = n()) %>% # n() is for looking duplicate number
  arrange(desc(n_coords)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4329) %>% 
  st_transform(crs1) %>% 
  rename(depth = mean_depth) %>% 
  dplyr::select(depth) %>% 
  mutate(source = "seismic"),
st_as_sf(wells_vect) %>% 
  mutate(source = "gw_wells"),

st_as_sf(lat_hit_rock) %>% 
  mutate(source = "lat_weathering"),

st_as_sf(scott_rocks) %>% 
  mutate(source = "scott_pedons"),

st_as_sf(rocks_1994) %>% 
  mutate(source = "rocks_1994",
         depth = as.numeric(0)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(depth, geometry, source),

st_as_sf(john_rocks))
# create depth classes for stratified random sampling
df_form <- as_tibble(no_auger)



df_form$group_equal_range <- cut(df_form$depth, breaks = number_of_classes, labels = FALSE)

# training versus validation split
training <- df_form %>% 
  group_by(group_equal_range) %>% 
  slice_sample(, prop = split)

validation <- anti_join(df_form, training)
training_sf <- st_as_sf(training)
validation_vect <- vect(st_as_sf(validation))

# calculate the sample variogram and experimental variogram
v <- variogram(depth~1, training_sf)
v.m <- fit.variogram(v, vgm(1, "Exp", 10, 1))

# run krige
k <- krige(depth~1, training_sf, grd, v.m)

# calculate RMSE using validation split, return it
extract(rast(k), validation_vect, ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  drop_na() %>% 
  summarise(RMSE = sqrt(mean((depth - var1.pred_var1.pred)^2)))

# Save Raster output
k_terra <- rast(k) %>% 
  crop(w3_outline) %>% 
  mask(w3_outline) %>% 
  select(var1.pred_var1.pred)
# Save output krigged map for whitebox operations
plot(k_terra)

krig_location <- "krig_output.tif"
#writeRaster(k_terra, krig_location, overwrite = TRUE)

# Final plot of semivariogram with all 5000 nsims, and the average one

# map of average depth?

```
```{r krig-output-map}
#map of watershed 3 with depth to bedrock
hillshade_location <- paste0(arsenal, "/w3_dems/1mdem_hillshade.tif")
hill <- rast(hillshade_location) %>% 
  crop(w3_outline) %>% 
  mask(w3_outline)


# Viridis plot
ggplot()+
  geom_spatraster(data = hill)+
  theme_void()+
  #theme(legend.position = "")+
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("gray9", "gray48","lightgray", "white"),
                       na.value = "transparent",
                       guide = "none")+
    new_scale_fill() +
  geom_spatraster(data = k_terra, aes(fill = var1.pred_var1.pred))+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(na.value = "transparent", alpha = 0.7, name = "Depth (m)")+
    geom_sf(data = w3_stream, colour = "lightgray") +
geom_sf(data = as.contour(dem1, nlevels = 30), color = "white", alpha = 0.3)+
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = 'tr',
                              pad_x = unit(0.4, "cm"),
                              pad_y = unit(1, "cm"))

# one color plot, using magma color scheme
ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  geom_spatraster(data = hill)+
  theme_void()+
  #theme(legend.position = "")+
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("gray9", "gray48","lightgray", "white"),
                       na.value = "transparent",
                       guide = "none")+
    new_scale_fill() +
  #theme(legend.position = "")+
  geom_spatraster(data = k_terra, 
                  aes(fill = var1.pred_var1.pred),
                  alpha = 0.7)+
    scale_fill_viridis_c(na.value = "transparent", name = "Depth (m)",option = "magma")+
  geom_sf(data = as.contour(dem1, nlevels = 30), color = "white", alpha = 0.1)+
      geom_sf(data = w3_regime, colour = "lightgray") +

  new_scale_fill()+
geom_sf(data = w3_stic_locs_r, aes(fill = pk), size = 3, pch = 21) +
#geom_sf(data = seeps, pch = 19, size = 3, color = "black") +
  #add point locations of seismic measurements
    geom_sf(data = combin_norm, alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
#geom_sf(data = combin_norm, aes(fill = depth), size = 3, pch = 21) +
# geom_text(data = seeps, aes(label = ID, geometry = geometry),
#                      stat = "sf_coordinates",
#                      nudge_x = 25, nudge_y = 25)  #scale_fill_manual(values = c("white", "grey", "black"), type = "binned")+
  #scale_fill_fermenter(n.breaks = 6, palette = "Greys")+
  #scale_fill_gradient(high = "#27408B", low = "white", guide = "none")+
  #scale_fill_viridis_c(na.value = "transparent", name = "Depth (m)")+
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               scale_name = "stepsn", 
               palette = function(x) c("#F0F2FA", "#B3C0E5","#4969C1", "#2A3F7A"),
               breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75),
               limits = c(0, 1),
               show.limits = TRUE, 
               guide = "colorsteps"
  )+
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = 'tr',
                              pad_x = unit(0.4, "cm"),
                              pad_y = unit(1, "cm"))+
    guides(colour = guide_coloursteps(show.limits = TRUE))

# plot of where validation points were good or bad
# calculate RMSE using validation split, return it
errors <- extract(rast(k), validation_vect, ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(error = depth - var1.pred_var1.pred)

ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  geom_spatraster(data = hill)+
  theme_void()+
  #theme(legend.position = "")+
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("gray9", "gray48","lightgray", "white"),
                       na.value = "transparent",
                       guide = "none")+
    new_scale_fill() +
  #theme(legend.position = "")+
  geom_spatraster(data = k_terra, 
                  aes(fill = var1.pred_var1.pred),
                  alpha = 0.7)+
    scale_fill_viridis_c(na.value = "transparent", name = "Depth (m)",option = "magma")+
  geom_sf(data = as.contour(dem1, nlevels = 30), color = "white", alpha = 0.1)+
      geom_sf(data = w3_regime, colour = "lightgray") +

  new_scale_fill()+
geom_sf(data = errors, aes(fill = error), size = 3, pch = 21) +
  scale_fill_gradient2()+
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = 'tr',
                              pad_x = unit(0.4, "cm"),
                              pad_y = unit(1, "cm"))+
    guides(colour = guide_coloursteps(show.limits = TRUE))

#make a map with baseflow permanence
w3_stic_locs_baseflow <- w3_stic_locs_r %>% left_join(baseflow_pk, by = "ID")

ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  geom_spatraster(data = hill)+
  theme_void()+
  #theme(legend.position = "")+
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("gray9", "gray48","lightgray", "white"),
                       na.value = "transparent",
                       guide = "none")+
    new_scale_fill() +
  #theme(legend.position = "")+
  geom_spatraster(data = k_terra, 
                  aes(fill = var1.pred_var1.pred),
                  alpha = 0.7)+
    scale_fill_viridis_c(na.value = "transparent", name = "Depth (m)",option = "magma")+
  geom_sf(data = as.contour(dem1, nlevels = 30), color = "white", alpha = 0.1)+
      geom_sf(data = w3_regime, colour = "lightgray") +

  new_scale_fill()+
geom_sf(data = w3_stic_locs_baseflow, aes(fill = baseflow_pk), size = 5, pch = 21) +
#geom_sf(data = seeps, pch = 19, size = 3, color = "black") +
  #add point locations of seismic measurements
    geom_sf(data = combin_norm, alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
#geom_sf(data = combin_norm, aes(fill = depth), size = 3, pch = 21) +
# geom_text(data = seeps, aes(label = ID, geometry = geometry),
#                      stat = "sf_coordinates",
#                      nudge_x = 25, nudge_y = 25)  #scale_fill_manual(values = c("white", "grey", "black"), type = "binned")+
  #scale_fill_fermenter(n.breaks = 6, palette = "Greys")+
  #scale_fill_gradient(high = "#27408B", low = "white", guide = "none")+
  #scale_fill_viridis_c(na.value = "transparent", name = "Depth (m)")+
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               scale_name = "stepsn", 
               palette = function(x) c("#F0F2FA", "#B3C0E5","#4969C1", "#2A3F7A"),
               breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75),
               limits = c(0, 1),
               show.limits = TRUE, 
               guide = "colorsteps"
  )+
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = 'tr',
                              pad_x = unit(0.4, "cm"),
                              pad_y = unit(1, "cm"))+
    guides(colour = guide_coloursteps(show.limits = TRUE))

```
```{r AGU-version}
# one color plot, using magma color scheme

just_seis <- combin_norm %>% 
  filter(source != "2019_auger")

W3_IDs <- read_csv(paste0(arsenal, "/W3_IDs.csv"))
W3_IDs <- W3_IDs$W3_IDs

w3_final_stics <- w3_stic_locs_r %>% 
  filter(ID %in% W3_IDs)


ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  geom_spatraster(data = hill)+
  theme_void()+
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("gray9", "gray48","lightgray", "white"),
                       na.value = "transparent",
                       guide = "none")+
  new_scale_fill() +
  geom_spatraster(data = k_terra, 
                  aes(fill = var1.pred_var1.pred),
                  alpha = 0.7)+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(na.value = "transparent", 
                       name = "Depth (m)",
                       option = "magma")+
  # geom_sf(data = as.contour(dem1, nlevels = 30),
  #         color = "white", alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_sf(data = w3_stream, 
          mapping = aes(linetype = "Maximum Flowing Extent"),
          colour = "black") +
  new_scale_fill()+
  geom_sf(data = w3_final_stics, 
          aes(fill = pk), 
          size = 3, 
          pch = 21) +
  geom_sf(data = just_seis,
          mapping = aes(pch = "Depth Observations"),
          fill = "white",
          color = "white",
          alpha = 0.5, 
          size = 0.5) +
  labs(linetype = "",
       pch = "")+
  binned_scale(name = "Flow Persistence",
               aesthetics = "fill",
               scale_name = "stepsn", 
               palette = function(x) c("#F0F2FA", "#B3C0E5","#4969C1", "#2A3F7A"),
               breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75),
               limits = c(0, 1),
               show.limits = TRUE, 
               guide = "colorsteps")+
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = 'tr',
                              pad_x = unit(0.4, "cm"),
                              pad_y = unit(1, "cm"))+
  guides(colour = guide_coloursteps(show.limits = TRUE))
ggsave("big_map.png", scale = 1.3)
```


Maps of depth, standard deviation, and relative uncertainty
```{r}
no_crazys_plotting <- no_crazys %>% 
  dplyr::select(lat, long, depth_mean, depth_sd, depth_cv) %>% 
  pivot_longer(-c(lat, long)) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4329) %>% 
  st_transform(crs1)

carlo_depth <- ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  geom_sf(data = w3_outline, color = "grey", fill = NA, alpha = 0.3, lwd = 2)+
  geom_sf(data = w3_stream, colour = "#9AC0CD", lwd = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = 
            dplyr::filter(no_crazys_plotting,
                          name == "depth_mean"), aes(fill = value), size = 2, pch = 21) +
  #scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  scale_fill_continuous(high = "purple4", low = "white",
                      name = "Depth (m)")+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(rect = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "left")

carlo_sd <- ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  geom_sf(data = w3_outline, color = "grey", fill = NA, alpha = 0.3, lwd = 2)+
  geom_sf(data = w3_stream, colour = "#9AC0CD", lwd = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = 
            dplyr::filter(no_crazys_plotting,
                          name == "depth_sd"), aes(fill = value), size = 2, pch = 21) +
  #scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  scale_fill_continuous(high = "darkred", low = "white",
                      name = "SD of Depth Estimate (m)")+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(rect = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "left")

carlo_depth + carlo_sd
```

Monte Carlo of krig
```{r}
depth_sim <- do.call(cbind, results)

all_rows <- newdata %>% 
  dplyr::select(lat, long, depth_mean, depth_sd, depth_cv) %>% 
  pivot_longer(-c(lat, long)) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4329) %>% 
  st_transform(crs1) %>% 
  drop_na()

pts <- all_rows %>%
  dplyr::filter(name == "depth_mean") %>%
  dplyr::select(geometry)



pts$depth <- depth_sim[1,]  # use one realization
pts <- drop_na(pts)
vg <- variogram(depth ~ 1, pts)

vg_model <- fit.variogram(
  vg,
  vgm(psill = 1, model = "Exp", range = 200, nugget = 0.1)
)

grid <- st_make_grid(pts, cellsize = 20) |> st_as_sf()


nsim <- nrow(depth_sim)

kriged <- vector("list", nsim)

for(i in 1:nsim){

  pts$depth <- depth_sim[i,]
  pts <- drop_na(pts)

  kr <- krige(
    depth ~ 1,
    pts,
    grid,
    model = vg_model
  )

  kriged[[i]] <- kr$var1.pred
}

kriged[[1]]

kriged_mat <- do.call(cbind, kriged)
grid$depth_mean <- rowMeans(kriged_mat)

grid$depth_sd <- apply(kriged_mat, 1, sd)

grid$depth_p05 <- apply(kriged_mat, 1, quantile, 0.05)

grid$depth_p95 <- apply(kriged_mat, 1, quantile, 0.95)
plot(grid)
```


# figure of individual watersheds
```{r}
# crop by watershed of each tributary
# read in pour points
read_csv("./transect_exports_oct1/pour_points.csv") %>% 
  vect(geom = c("x", "y"), crs = crs1) %>% 
  writeVector("subshed_pour_points.shp", overwrite = TRUE)


filled_dem <- paste0(arsenal, "/w3_dems/1mdem_w3_filled.tif")
wbt_fill_depressions_wang_and_liu(
  dem = dem1_location,
  output = filled_dem
)

flowacc_location <- paste0(arsenal, "/w3_dems/1mdem_w3_flowacc.tif")
wbt_d_inf_flow_accumulation(input = filled_dem,
                            output = flowacc_location,
                            out_type = "Specific Contributing Area")

flowdir_location <- paste0(arsenal, "/w3_dems/1mdem_w3_flowdir.tif")
wbt_d8_pointer(dem = filled_dem,
               output = flowdir_location)

surface_streams <- "./export_to_arc/surface_streams.tif"
wbt_extract_streams(flow_accum = flowacc_location,
                    output = surface_streams,
                    threshold = 2000)
plot(rast(surface_streams), col ="black")
points(vect("subshed_locs_snap.shp"), col = "red")

points(vect("subshed_pour_points.shp"))

#snap pour point to streams
subshed_locs_snap <- "subshed_locs_snap.shp"
wbt_jenson_snap_pour_points(pour_pts = "subshed_pour_points.shp",
                            streams = surface_streams,
                            output = subshed_locs_snap,
                            snap_dist = 10)

plot(rast(paste0(arsenal, "/w3_dems/1mdem_w3_flowacc.tif")))
d8 <- paste0(arsenal, "/w3_dems/1mdem_w3_d8pt.tif")
subsheds <- "subsheds.tif"
wbt_watershed(d8_pntr = flowdir_location,
              pour_pts = subshed_locs_snap,
              output = subsheds)
plot(rast(subsheds), col = my_colors)

# now crop by each of these sheds, and plot each individually
subby <- rast(subsheds)

subby[subby > 1] <- NA
subby[subby > 1] <- NA


plot(subby)


```

## Crop and mask by each subwatershed
```{r}
# now crop by each of these sheds, and plot each individually
subby <- rast(subsheds)

subby[subby != 3] <- NA

plot(subby)
subby <- mask(subby, subby)
sub_outline <- as.polygons(subby, extent=FALSE)

# crop and mask hillshade and depth raster
hill_crop <- hill %>% 
  crop(sub_outline) %>% 
  mask(sub_outline)
plot(hill_crop)

k_terra_crop <- k_terra %>% 
  crop(sub_outline) %>% 
  mask(sub_outline)

crop(w3_regime, sub_outline)  %>% plot()
ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  geom_spatraster(data = hill_crop)+
  theme_void()+
  #theme(legend.position = "")+
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("gray9", "gray48","lightgray", "white"),
                       na.value = "transparent",
                       guide = "none")+
    new_scale_fill() +
  #theme(legend.position = "")+
  geom_spatraster(data = k_terra_crop, 
                  aes(fill = var1.pred_var1.pred),
                  alpha = 0.7)+
    scale_fill_viridis_c(na.value = "transparent", 
                         name = "Depth (m)",option = "magma",
                         limits = c(0, 8))+
    geom_sf(data = as.contour(crop(dem1, sub_outline), nlevels = 30), 
            color = "white", alpha = 0.1)+
    geom_sf(data = crop(w3_regime, sub_outline), colour = "lightgray") +
      new_scale_fill()+
    geom_sf(data = crop(w3_stic_locs_r, sub_outline), 
                        aes(fill = pk), size = 3, pch = 21) +
    geom_sf(data = crop(combin_norm, sub_outline), 
            alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +

  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               scale_name = "stepsn", 
               palette = function(x) c("#F0F2FA", "#B3C0E5","#4969C1", "#2A3F7A"),
               breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75),
               limits = c(0, 1),
               show.limits = TRUE, 
               guide = "colorsteps"
  )+
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = 'tr',
                              pad_x = unit(0.4, "cm"),
                              pad_y = unit(1, "cm"))+
    guides(colour = guide_coloursteps(show.limits = TRUE))
```


# RF to try to tell a story
Create input dataset to RF...
Different neighborhoods and different spatial scales of topography and depth, to try and predict flow permanence and baseflow flow permanence

```{r}
#trouble shooting
plot(zones)
plot(mask_soil_uniform)
plot(project(mask_soil_uniform, zones))
plot(resample(project(mask_soil_uniform, zones), zones, method="bilinear"), add = TRUE)
zones_test <- zones
zones_test[zones_test != 1] <- NA
plot(zones_test, col = "red")
zonal(
  resample(
    project(
      mask_soil_uniform, zones), 
    zones, method="bilinear"), 
 zones, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[,2] %>% 
  replace_na(0)
```

# Add two additional variables, then run random Forest again
```{r ROE from soil model}
#num key
soil_key <- read_csv("HPU_num_key.csv")

#https://portal.edirepository.org/nis/mapbrowse?packageid=knb-lter-hbr.380.2
soil <- terra::rast("https://pasta.lternet.edu/package/data/eml/knb-lter-hbr/380/2/f083871fa0116b17b7398ca48eac7627")
crop_soil <- crop(soil, w3_outline)
mask_soil <- mask(crop_soil, w3_outline)
plot(mask_soil) #currently in NAD83

# remove all values that are not ROE
# 2 = Bhs, 4 = E, 7 = 0
mask_soil[mask_soil == 1] <- NA
mask_soil[mask_soil == 3] <- NA
mask_soil[mask_soil == 8] <- NA
mask_soil[mask_soil == 5] <- NA
plot(mask_soil)

# use raster algebra to set all values equal to 1, use in RF as sum
mask_soil_uniform <- (mask_soil * 0) + 1
plot(mask_soil_uniform)
```
Removed all total depths/volumes of storage, because they were too related to drainage area. 
```{r prepare-RF-inputs}
# uaab from JP
uaab <- (rast("uaab_norm2_SHRINKED.tif"))

crop_uaab <- crop(uaab, w3_outline)
mask_uaab <- mask(crop_uaab, w3_outline)
plot(mask_uaab)
# come up with a set of functions to extract relevant topography and subsurface neighborhoods
# dem_locations
plot(rast(dem1_location))
plot(rast(dem3_location))
plot(rast(dem5_location))
plot(rast(dem10_location))
### fill DEMs #####
fill1_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/1mdem_fill.tif")
fill3_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/3mdem_fill.tif")
fill5_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/5mdem_fill.tif")
fill10_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/10mdem_fill.tif")

wbt_fill_depressions_wang_and_liu(
  dem = dem1_location,
  output = fill1_output
)
wbt_fill_depressions_wang_and_liu(
  dem = dem3_location,
  output = fill3_output
)
wbt_fill_depressions_wang_and_liu(
  dem = dem5_location,
  output = fill5_output
)
wbt_fill_depressions_wang_and_liu(
  dem = dem10_location,
  output = fill10_output
)
### Drainage area ####
flowacc1_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/1mdem_flowacc.tif")
flowacc3_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/3mdem_flowacc.tif")
flowacc5_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/5mdem_flowacc.tif")
flowacc10_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/10mdem_flowacc.tif")
wbt_d_inf_flow_accumulation(input = fill1_output,
                            output = flowacc1_output,
                            out_type = "Specific Contributing Area")
wbt_d_inf_flow_accumulation(input = fill3_output,
                            output = flowacc3_output,
                            out_type = "Specific Contributing Area")
wbt_d_inf_flow_accumulation(input = fill5_output,
                            output = flowacc5_output,
                            out_type = "Specific Contributing Area")
wbt_d_inf_flow_accumulation(input = fill10_output,
                            output = flowacc10_output,
                            out_type = "Specific Contributing Area")
### Slope ####
slope1_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/1mdem_slope.tif")
slope3_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/3mdem_slope.tif")
slope5_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/5mdem_slope.tif")
slope10_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/10mdem_slope.tif")

wbt_slope(dem = fill1_output,
          output = slope1_output,
          units = "degrees")
wbt_slope(dem = fill3_output,
          output = slope3_output,
          units = "degrees")
wbt_slope(dem = fill5_output,
          output = slope5_output,
          units = "degrees")
wbt_slope(dem = fill10_output,
          output = slope10_output,
          units = "degrees")
### TPI ####
tpi1_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/1mdem_tpi.tif")
tpi3_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/3mdem_tpi.tif")
tpi5_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/5mdem_tpi.tif")
tpi10_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/10mdem_tpi.tif")

# diff resolutions, but the same kernel size
wbt_relative_topographic_position(
    dem = fill1_output, 
    output = tpi1_output, 
    filterx=11, 
    filtery=11)
wbt_relative_topographic_position(
    dem = fill3_output, 
    output = tpi3_output, 
    filterx=11, 
    filtery=11)
wbt_relative_topographic_position(
    dem = fill5_output, 
    output = tpi5_output, 
    filterx=11, 
    filtery=11)
wbt_relative_topographic_position(
    dem = fill10_output, 
    output = tpi10_output, 
    filterx=11, 
    filtery=11)
### TWI ####
twi1_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/1mdem_twi.tif")
twi3_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/3mdem_twi.tif")
twi5_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/5mdem_twi.tif")
twi10_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/10mdem_twi.tif")

wbt_wetness_index(sca = flowacc1_output, #flow accumulation
                  slope = slope1_output,
                  output = twi1_output)
wbt_wetness_index(sca = flowacc3_output, #flow accumulation
                  slope = slope3_output,
                  output = twi3_output)
wbt_wetness_index(sca = flowacc5_output, #flow accumulation
                  slope = slope5_output,
                  output = twi5_output)
wbt_wetness_index(sca = flowacc10_output, #flow accumulation
                  slope = slope10_output,
                  output = twi10_output)
### Curve ####
#1m
curve1_plan_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/1mdem_curve_plan.tif")
curve1_prof_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/1mdem_curve_prof.tif")
curve1_plan <- spatialEco::curvature(rast(dem1_location), type = "planform")
curve1_prof <- spatialEco::curvature(rast(dem1_location), type = "profile")
writeRaster(curve1_plan, curve1_plan_output, overwrite = TRUE)
writeRaster(curve1_prof, curve1_prof_output, overwrite = TRUE)
#3m 
curve3_plan_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/3mdem_curve_plan.tif")
curve3_prof_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/3mdem_curve_prof.tif")
curve3_plan <- spatialEco::curvature(rast(dem3_location), type = "planform")
curve3_prof <- spatialEco::curvature(rast(dem3_location), type = "profile")
writeRaster(curve3_plan, curve3_plan_output, overwrite = TRUE)
writeRaster(curve3_prof, curve3_prof_output, overwrite = TRUE)
#5m
curve5_plan_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/5mdem_curve_plan.tif")
curve5_prof_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/5mdem_curve_prof.tif")
curve5_plan <- spatialEco::curvature(rast(dem5_location), type = "planform")
curve5_prof <- spatialEco::curvature(rast(dem5_location), type = "profile")
writeRaster(curve5_plan, curve5_plan_output, overwrite = TRUE)
writeRaster(curve5_prof, curve5_prof_output, overwrite = TRUE)
#10m
curve10_plan_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/10mdem_curve_plan.tif")
curve10_prof_output <- paste0(arsenal,"/w3_dems/10mdem_curve_prof.tif")
curve10_plan <- spatialEco::curvature(rast(dem10_location), type = "planform")
curve10_prof <- spatialEco::curvature(rast(dem10_location), type = "profile")
writeRaster(curve10_plan, curve10_plan_output, overwrite = TRUE)
writeRaster(curve10_prof, curve10_prof_output, overwrite = TRUE)

### Resamp Depth ####
depth1 <- k_terra
depth3 <- aggregate(k_terra, 3)
depth5 <- aggregate(k_terra, 5)
depth10 <- aggregate(k_terra, 10)

### Extracting point values ####
point_values <- 
  extract(rast(flowacc10_output), 
                  w3_stic_locs_r, ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>% 
  extract(rast(flowacc5_output), 
                  ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>% 
  extract(rast(flowacc3_output), 
                  ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(flowacc1_output), 
                  ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(slope10_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(slope5_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(slope3_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(slope1_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(tpi10_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(tpi5_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(tpi3_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(tpi1_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(twi10_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(twi5_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(twi3_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(rast(twi1_output), ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(curve10_plan, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(curve10_prof, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(curve5_plan, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(curve5_prof, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(curve3_plan, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(curve3_prof, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(curve1_plan, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(curve1_prof, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(depth10, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(depth5, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(depth3, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(depth1, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  extract(mask_uaab, ., ID = FALSE, bind = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()
point_values_comb <- point_values %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("point_values", .x))
  
### extract by neighborhoods ####
# create different sized buffers around points, then conduct zonal on them
#buffer1 <- terra::buffer(w3_stic_locs_r, width = 1)
buffer10 <- terra::buffer(w3_stic_locs_r, width = 10)
buffer20 <- terra::buffer(w3_stic_locs_r, width = 20)
buffer100 <- terra::buffer(w3_stic_locs_r, width = 100)

# buffed_1m <- bind_cols( 
#   # zonal(rast(flowacc10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE), 
#   # zonal(rast(flowacc5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#   #        zonal(rast(flowacc3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          zonal(rast(flowacc1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(rast(slope10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(rast(slope5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(rast(slope3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          zonal(rast(slope1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(rast(tpi10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(rast(tpi5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(rast(tpi3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          zonal(rast(tpi1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(rast(twi10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(rast(twi5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(rast(twi3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          zonal(rast(twi1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(curve10_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(curve10_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(curve5_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(curve5_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(curve3_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          # zonal(curve3_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          zonal(curve1_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          zonal(curve1_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
# #         dplyr::rename(zonal(depth10, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
# #                 "mean_depth10m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# # dplyr::rename(zonal(depth5, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
# #                 "mean_depth5m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# # dplyr::rename(zonal(depth3, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
# #                 "mean_depth3m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"), 
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth1, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "mean_depth1m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# # dplyr::rename(zonal(depth10, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE),
# #                 "total_depth10m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# # dplyr::rename(zonal(depth5, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
# #                 "total_depth5m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# # dplyr::rename(zonal(depth3, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
# #                 "total_depth3m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# # dplyr::rename(zonal(depth1, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
# #                 "total_depth1m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# #add two new variables
# zonal(mask_uaab, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
# zonal(mask_uaab, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE),
# zonal(mask_soil_uniform, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)
# 
#          ) %>% 
#   as_tibble()

buffer1 <- buffer10
buffed_10m <- bind_cols( 
  # zonal(rast(flowacc10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE), 
  # zonal(rast(flowacc5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
  #        zonal(rast(flowacc3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(flowacc1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(slope10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(slope5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(slope3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(slope1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(tpi10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(tpi5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(tpi3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(tpi1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(twi10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(twi5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(twi3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(twi1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve10_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve10_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve5_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve5_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve3_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve3_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(curve1_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(curve1_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#          dplyr::rename(zonal(depth10, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "mean_depth10m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth5, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "mean_depth5m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth3, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "mean_depth3m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"), 
dplyr::rename(zonal(depth1, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
                "mean_depth1m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth10, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth10m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth5, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth5m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth3, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth3m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth1, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth1m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
#add two new variables
zonal(mask_uaab, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#zonal(mask_uaab, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE),
#zonal(mask_soil_uniform, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)
         ) %>% 
  as_tibble()

buffer1 <- buffer20
buffed_20m <- bind_cols( 
  # zonal(rast(flowacc10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE), 
  # zonal(rast(flowacc5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
  #        zonal(rast(flowacc3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(flowacc1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(slope10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(slope5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(slope3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(slope1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(tpi10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(tpi5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(tpi3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(tpi1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(twi10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(twi5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(twi3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(twi1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve10_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve10_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve5_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve5_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve3_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve3_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(curve1_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(curve1_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#         dplyr::rename(zonal(depth10, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "mean_depth10m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth5, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "mean_depth5m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth3, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "mean_depth3m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"), 
dplyr::rename(zonal(depth1, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
                "mean_depth1m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth10, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth10m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth5, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth5m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth3, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth3m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth1, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth1m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
#add two new variables
zonal(mask_uaab, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#zonal(mask_uaab, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE),
#zonal(mask_soil_uniform, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)
         ) %>% 
  as_tibble()

buffer1 <- buffer100
buffed_100m <- bind_cols( 
  # zonal(rast(flowacc10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE), 
  # zonal(rast(flowacc5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
  #        zonal(rast(flowacc3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(flowacc1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(slope10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(slope5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(slope3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(slope1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(tpi10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(tpi5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(tpi3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(tpi1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(twi10_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(twi5_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(rast(twi3_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(rast(twi1_output), buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve10_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve10_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve5_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve5_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve3_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         # zonal(curve3_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(curve1_plan, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
         zonal(curve1_prof, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth10, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "mean_depth10m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth5, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "mean_depth5m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth3, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "mean_depth3m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"), 
dplyr::rename(zonal(depth1, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
                "mean_depth1m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth10, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth10m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth5, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth5m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth3, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth3m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
# dplyr::rename(zonal(depth1, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#                 "total_depth1m" = "var1.pred_var1.pred"),
#add two new variables
zonal(mask_uaab, buffer1, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE),
#zonal(mask_uaab, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE),
#zonal(mask_soil_uniform, buffer1, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)
) %>% 
  as_tibble()

buffed_10m_comb <- buffed_10m %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("nb10m_", .x))
buffed_20m_comb <- buffed_20m %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("nb20m_", .x))
buffed_100m_comb <- buffed_100m %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("nb100m_", .x))

#still need to combine all of these
all <- bind_cols(point_values_comb, buffed_10m_comb, buffed_20m_comb, buffed_100m_comb) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-point_valuesID, -point_valueswshed)
### extract by watersheds ####
zones <- rast(w3_surface_sheds)
plot(zones)
# Zonal function- take zonal statistics
# evelation
dem_r  <- resample(project(depth1, zones), zones, method="bilinear")
z_dem <- zonal(dem_r, zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)

wshed_zones <- tibble(
  # slope10m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(slope10_output)
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # slope5m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(slope5_output)
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # slope3m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(slope3_output)
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  slope1m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(slope1_output)
                                 , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
                zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # tpi10m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(tpi10_output)
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # tpi5m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(tpi5_output)
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # tpi3m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(tpi3_output)
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  tpi1m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(tpi1_output)
                                 , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
                zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # twi10m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(twi10_output)
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # twi5m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(twi5_output)
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # twi3m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(twi3_output)
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  twi1m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(rast(twi1_output)
                                 , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
                zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # curve10mplan_wshed = zonal(resample(project(curve10_plan
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # curve10mprof_wshed = zonal(resample(project(curve10_prof
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # curve5mplan_wshed = zonal(resample(project(curve5_plan
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # curve5mprof_wshed = zonal(resample(project(curve5_prof
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # curve3mplan_wshed = zonal(resample(project(curve3_plan
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # curve3mprof_wshed = zonal(resample(project(curve3_prof
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  curve1mplan_wshed = zonal(resample(project(curve1_plan
                                 , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
                zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  curve1mprof_wshed = zonal(resample(project(curve1_prof
                                 , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
                zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # avgdepth10m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(depth10
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # avgdepth5m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(depth5
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # avgdepth3m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(depth3
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  avgdepth1m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(depth1
                                 , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
                zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # totaldepth10m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(depth10
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # totaldepth5m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(depth5
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # totaldepth3m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(depth3
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  # totaldepth1m_wshed = zonal(resample(project(depth1
  #                                , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
  #               zones, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  #add two new variables
  meanuaab_wshed = zonal(resample(project(mask_uaab
                                 , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
                zones, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  totaluaab_wshed = zonal(resample(project(mask_uaab
                                 , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
                zones, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[,2],
  totalROE_wshed = zonal(resample(project(mask_soil_uniform
                                 , zones), zones, method="bilinear"), 
                zones, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[,2]
  
)

all <- bind_cols(point_values_comb, wshed_zones) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-point_valuesID, -point_valueswshed)
all <- bind_cols(point_values_comb, buffed_10m_comb, buffed_20m_comb, buffed_100m_comb, wshed_zones) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-point_valuesID, -point_valueswshed)
### extract by neighbors in watersheds ####
#creating zone in shed function
# input_dataset <- depth10
 buffer_dataset <- buffer10
plot(rast(w3_surface_sheds))
text(vect("mod_bed_points.shp"), cex = 0.75)
plot(buffer10, add = TRUE)
text(buffer10, cex = 0.75)

# col_name <- "wsnb100_depth10"

## BIG MISMATCH BETWEEN THE ID COLUMN OF WSHED ZONES AND ID OF PK POINTS

zone_in_shed <- function(input_dataset, buffer_dataset, col_name){
for(i in 1:length(buffer_dataset$ID)){
#i <- 29
#input_dataset <- rast(flowacc10_output)
#buffer_dataset <- buffer1
#col_name <- "wsnb100_depth10"
  ID <- i
  zones <- rast(w3_surface_sheds)

  zones[zones != ID] <- NA
  zones_masked <- mask(zones, buffer_dataset[buffer_dataset$ID == ID])
  plot(zones)
  plot(buffer_dataset[buffer_dataset$ID == ID], add = TRUE)
  input_resamp  <- resample(project(input_dataset, zones_masked), 
                            zones_masked, method="bilinear")
  output <- zonal(input_resamp, zones_masked, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)
  if(i == 1) alldat <- output
  if(i > 1) alldat <- rbind(alldat, output)
}
  #alldat <- tibble(alldat[,2])
  colnames(alldat) <- c("ID", col_name)
  return(alldat)
}
zone_in_shed(
  depth10,
  buffer1,
  "wsnb100_depth10"
)


buffer1 <- terra::buffer(vect("mod_bed_points.shp"), width = 1) %>% 
  tidyterra::mutate(ID = FID + 1)
buffer10 <- terra::buffer(vect("mod_bed_points.shp"), width = 10) %>% 
  tidyterra::mutate(ID = FID + 1)
buffer20 <- terra::buffer(vect("mod_bed_points.shp"), width = 20) %>% 
  tidyterra::mutate(ID = FID + 1)
buffer100 <- terra::buffer(vect("mod_bed_points.shp"), width = 100) %>% 
  tidyterra::mutate(ID = FID + 1)

#### Buffer 1 ####
Sys.time()
# wsnb1 <- 
#   full_join(
#       zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc10_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_flowacc10"),
#       zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc5_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_flowacc5")) %>% 
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc3_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_flowacc3")) %>% 
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc1_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_flowacc1")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope10_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_slope10")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope5_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_slope5")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope3_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_slope3")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope1_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_slope1")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi10_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_tpi10")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi5_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_tpi5")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi3_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_tpi3")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi1_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_tpi1")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi10_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_twi10")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi5_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_twi5")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi3_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_twi3")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi1_output), buffer1, "wsnb1_twi1")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(curve10_plan, buffer1, "wsnb1_curve10_plan")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(curve10_prof, buffer1, "wsnb1_curve10_prof")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(curve5_plan, buffer1, "wsnb1_curve5_plan")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(curve5_prof, buffer1, "wsnb1_curve5_prof")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(curve3_plan, buffer1, "wsnb1_curve3_plan")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(curve3_prof, buffer1, "wsnb1_curve3_prof")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(curve1_plan, buffer1, "wsnb1_curve1_plan")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(curve1_prof, buffer1, "wsnb1_curve1_prof")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(depth10, buffer1, "wsnb1_depth10")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(depth5, buffer1, "wsnb1_depth5")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(depth3, buffer1, "wsnb1_depth3")) %>%
#     full_join(zone_in_shed(depth1, buffer1, "wsnb1_depth1")) #%>% 
  #add two new variables
    # full_join(zone_in_shed(mask_uaab, buffer1, "wsnb1_uaab")) %>% 
    # full_join(zone_in_shed(mask_soil_uniform, buffer1, "wsnb1_ROE")


Sys.time()
#### Buffer 10 ####
wsnb10 <- 
    zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc10_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_flowacc10") %>% 
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc5_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_flowacc5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc3_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_flowacc3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc1_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_flowacc1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope10_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_slope10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope5_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_slope5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope3_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_slope3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope1_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_slope1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi10_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_tpi10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi5_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_tpi5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi3_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_tpi3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi1_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_tpi1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi10_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_twi10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi5_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_twi5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi3_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_twi3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi1_output), buffer10, "wsnb10_twi1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve10_plan, buffer10, "wsnb10_curve10_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve10_prof, buffer10, "wsnb10_curve10_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve5_plan, buffer10, "wsnb10_curve5_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve5_prof, buffer10, "wsnb10_curve5_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve3_plan, buffer10, "wsnb10_curve3_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve3_prof, buffer10, "wsnb10_curve3_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve1_plan, buffer10, "wsnb10_curve1_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve1_prof, buffer10, "wsnb10_curve1_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth10, buffer10, "wsnb10_depth10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth5, buffer10, "wsnb10_depth5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth3, buffer10, "wsnb10_depth3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth1, buffer10, "wsnb10_depth1")) %>% 
  #add two new variables
    full_join(zone_in_shed(mask_uaab, buffer1, "wsnb1_uaab")) %>% 
    full_join(zone_in_shed(mask_soil_uniform, buffer1, "wsnb1_ROE")

)
#### Buffer 20 ####
wsnb20 <- zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc10_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_flowacc10") %>% 
  full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc5_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_flowacc5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc3_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_flowacc3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc1_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_flowacc1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope10_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_slope10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope5_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_slope5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope3_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_slope3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope1_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_slope1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi10_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_tpi10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi5_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_tpi5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi3_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_tpi3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi1_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_tpi1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi10_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_twi10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi5_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_twi5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi3_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_twi3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi1_output), buffer20, "wsnb20_twi1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve10_plan, buffer20, "wsnb20_curve10_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve10_prof, buffer20, "wsnb20_curve10_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve5_plan, buffer20, "wsnb20_curve5_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve5_prof, buffer20, "wsnb20_curve5_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve3_plan, buffer20, "wsnb20_curve3_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve3_prof, buffer20, "wsnb20_curve3_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve1_plan, buffer20, "wsnb20_curve1_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve1_prof, buffer20, "wsnb20_curve1_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth10, buffer20, "wsnb20_depth10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth5, buffer20, "wsnb20_depth5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth3, buffer20, "wsnb20_depth3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth1, buffer20, "wsnb20_depth1")) %>% 
  #add two new variables
    full_join(zone_in_shed(mask_uaab, buffer1, "wsnb1_uaab")) %>% 
    full_join(zone_in_shed(mask_soil_uniform, buffer1, "wsnb1_ROE"))

#### Buffer 100 ####
wsnb100 <- 
  zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc10_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_flowacc10") %>% 
  full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc5_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_flowacc5")) %>% 
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc3_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_flowacc3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(flowacc1_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_flowacc1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope10_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_slope10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope5_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_slope5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope3_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_slope3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(slope1_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_slope1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi10_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_tpi10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi5_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_tpi5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi3_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_tpi3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(tpi1_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_tpi1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi10_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_twi10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi5_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_twi5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi3_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_twi3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(rast(twi1_output), buffer100, "wsnb100_twi1")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve10_plan, buffer100, "wsnb100_curve10_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve10_prof, buffer100, "wsnb100_curve10_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve5_plan, buffer100, "wsnb100_curve5_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve5_prof, buffer100, "wsnb100_curve5_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve3_plan, buffer100, "wsnb100_curve3_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve3_prof, buffer100, "wsnb100_curve3_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve1_plan, buffer100, "wsnb100_curve1_plan")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(curve1_prof, buffer100, "wsnb100_curve1_prof")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth10, buffer100, "wsnb100_depth10")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth5, buffer100, "wsnb100_depth5")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth3, buffer100, "wsnb100_depth3")) %>%
    full_join(zone_in_shed(depth1, buffer100, "wsnb100_depth1")) %>% 
  #add two new variables
    full_join(zone_in_shed(mask_uaab, buffer1, "wsnb1_uaab")) %>% 
    full_join(zone_in_shed(mask_soil_uniform, buffer1, "wsnb1_ROE") 
                

)
#### ####
#wsnb10[is.na(wsnb10)] <- 0

all_wsnb <- 
  wsnb10 %>% 
  full_join(wsnb20) %>% 
  full_join(wsnb100) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-ID) #%>% 
  #dplyr::select(-wsnb1_ROE) %>% 
  #dplyr::select(-wsnb1_uaab)
all <- bind_cols(point_values_comb, buffed_10m_comb, buffed_20m_comb, buffed_100m_comb, wshed_zones) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-point_valueswshed) 

all_zeros <- all
all_zeros[is.na(all_zeros)] <- 0
all <- bind_cols(all, all_wsnb) %>% 
  dplyr::select(where(~!any(is.na(.))))
  #drop_na()
#check for NAs
View(all_zeros[!complete.cases(all_zeros), ])
na_counts <- colSums(is.na(all_zeros))

names(na_counts[na_counts > 0])

#write_csv(all, "all_rf_inputs.csv")
### Or just include ratio of depths...
#calculate the ratio of depth nearby to close
# 1m, 5m, 10m, 100m neighborhoods
# slope, curvature, average depth, total volume, TWI, one drainage area 

# within drainage areas
# immediate area
```

After calcing all of these co-variates, do some pre-processing
```{r}
cor_mat <- cor(depths_hehe %>% dplyr::select(-point_valuespk), use = "complete.obs")

high_cor <- findCorrelation(cor_mat, cutoff = 0.8, names = TRUE)

low_cor <- depths_hehe %>% dplyr::select(-high_cor)

# also try RF using just different depth metrics?
depths_hehe <- all_zeros %>% 
  dplyr::select(point_valuespk, contains("depth"),
                "point_valuesvar1.pred_var1.pred...28",
                "point_valuesvar1.pred_var1.pred...29",
                "point_valuesvar1.pred_var1.pred...30",
                "point_valuesvar1.pred_var1.pred...31",
                #"point_valuescatcharea_br_SHRINKED",
                #"nb10m_catcharea_br_SHRINKED...41",
                #"nb10m_f083871fa0116b17b7398ca48eac7627",
                #"nb20m_catcharea_br_SHRINKED...53",
                #"nb20m_catcharea_br_SHRINKED...54",
                #"nb20m_f083871fa0116b17b7398ca48eac7627",
                #"nb100m_catcharea_br_SHRINKED...66",
                #"nb100m_catcharea_br_SHRINKED...67",
                #"nb100m_f083871fa0116b17b7398ca48eac7627",
                contains("soil"),
                #contains("uaab"),
                contains("ROE"))

low_cor %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = nb1m_catcharea_br_SHRINKED...41, y = point_valuesX1mdem_flowacc))+
  geom_point()
```

JP and Kevin think I should also test drainage area weighted by bedrock, and ROE from soil model.

Other things to try: 
- entire drainage areas
- forcing the model to work with only TWI and depth, or something like that

```{r checking-for-linear}
# After calcing all of these numbers, now see if there are any linear trends


test2 <- all[,1:2]
testlm <- lm(point_valuespk ~ point_valuesX10mdem_flowacc, data = test2)
summary(testlm)

test3 <- all %>% 
  select(colnames(all[vsurfSpam$varselect.pred]))
plot(test3)
  
significant <- all %>% 
  pivot_longer(-point_valuespk, values_to = "value", names_to = "names") %>% 
group_by(names) %>% 
  do(model = lm(point_valuespk ~ value, data = .)) %>%
  mutate(p_value = summary(model)$coefficients[2,4],
         r_sq = summary(model)$r.squared) %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.05)
  
all %>% 
  pivot_longer(-point_valuespk, values_to = "value", names_to = "names") %>% 
  filter(names %in% significant$names) %>% 
group_by(names) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = point_valuespk, y = value, color = names))+
    geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = FALSE)+
    facet_wrap(~names, scale = "free_y")+
  theme_classic()
```

# New clean run through of whole RF routine
1/27/26- getting ready for final iteration

Testing something
```{r VSURF aggregate runs all variables}
# try running vsurf many times, finding most consistent predictors
n_runs <- 10
results <- vector("list", n_runs)

all_df <- as.data.frame(all_zeros) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-point_valuesID)

# VSURF routine
iris.learn <- list()
iris.learn$training <- all_df[,-1]
iris.learn$pk <- all_df[,1]

for(i in 1:n_runs){
  set.seed(1000 + i)
  
  results[[i]] <- VSURF(x = iris.learn$training, 
                    y = iris.learn$pk, 
                    na.action = na.omit,
                    parallel = TRUE, 
                    ncores = 3, clusterType = "FORK", ntree = 5000)

}


selected <- lapply(results, function(res)
  colnames(iris.learn$training)[res$varselect.interp]
)

all_vars <- colnames(iris.learn$training)

freq <- table(unlist(selected)) / n_runs

freq <- sort(freq, decreasing = TRUE)
freq
topography_selected
topography_selected <- freq
```
```{r VSURF aggregate runs depth}
# try running vsurf many times, finding most consistent predictors
n_runs <- 10
results <- vector("list", n_runs)

all_df <- as.data.frame(depths_hehe) 

# VSURF routine
iris.learn <- list()
iris.learn$training <- all_df[,-1]
iris.learn$pk <- all_df[,1]

for(i in 1:n_runs){
  set.seed(1000 + i)
  
  results[[i]] <- VSURF(x = iris.learn$training, 
                    y = iris.learn$pk, 
                    na.action = na.omit,
                    parallel = TRUE, 
                    ncores = 3, clusterType = "FORK", ntree = 5000)

}


selected <- lapply(results, function(res)
  colnames(iris.learn$training)[res$varselect.interp]
)

all_vars <- colnames(iris.learn$training)

freq <- table(unlist(selected)) / n_runs

freq <- sort(freq, decreasing = TRUE)
depth_selected2 <- freq #with variable preprocessing
depth_selected2
depth_selected # orginal
```
 final RF parameters:
 All_zeros: point_valuesX5mdem_slope    point_valuesX5mdem_twi point_valuesX10mdem_slope               tpi1m_wshed
 just depth info: meanuaab_wshed  nb100m_mean_depth1m

Final, formatted chunk that works! Do not fiddle
```{r RF-analysis-template}
set.seed(2)
#remove ID column
all_df <- as.data.frame(depths_hehe) #%>% 
  dplyr::select(-point_valuesID)

#check for NAs. All 3 checks should return something empty
View(all_df[!complete.cases(all_df), ])
na_counts <- colSums(is.na(all_df))
names(na_counts[na_counts > 0])

# VSURF routine
iris.learn <- list()
iris.learn$training <- all_df[,-1]
iris.learn$pk <- all_df[,1]

iris.vsurf <- VSURF(x = iris.learn$training, 
                    y = iris.learn$pk, 
                    na.action = na.omit,
                    parallel = TRUE, 
                    ncores = 3, clusterType = "FORK", ntree = 100000)
plot(iris.vsurf)
colnames(iris.learn$training[iris.vsurf$varselect.interp])
colnames(iris.learn$training[iris.vsurf$varselect.pred])


iris.predictions <- predict(iris.vsurf, newdata = iris.learn$training, step = "pred")
#calculate RMSE
tibble(iris.predictions, "actual" = iris.learn$pk) %>% 
  mutate(diff = actual - iris.predictions) %>% 
  summarise(RMSE = sqrt(mean((actual - iris.predictions)^2)))



# subset after VSURF selection routine
chosen_vars <- colnames(iris.learn$training[iris.vsurf$varselect.pred])

chosen_df <- all_df %>% 
  dplyr::select(point_valuespk, chosen_vars)

# Run normal RF and output OOB error, number of variables
RFDef <- randomForest(point_valuespk ~ ., data = chosen_df, na.action = na.omit, ntree = 5000, importance = TRUE)
RFDef
plot(RFDef)

varImpPlot(RFDef, type = 1, scale = TRUE, cex = 0.8, main = "Variable importance")

#plot of partial dependence
imp <- importance(RFDef)
impvar <- rownames(imp)[order(imp[, 1], decreasing=TRUE)]
#impvar1 <- impvar[1:10]
#impvar1 <- colnames(all[vsurfSpam$varselect.pred])
axes_labels <- c("5 m slope",
                 "10 m neighborhood flow acc.",
                 "10 m slope",
                 "100 m WS neighborhood plan curvature",
                 "3 m slope")
impvar <- impvar[1:4]
op <- par(mfrow=c(1, length(impvar)))
for (i in seq_along(impvar)) {
    partialPlot(RFDef, as.data.frame(all_df), impvar[i],
                #main=paste("Partial Dependence on", impvar1[i]),
                main = "",
                cex = 0.1,
                rug = TRUE,
                ylim = c(0.45, 0.65),
                xlab = axes_labels[i])
}
par(op)




# Plot residual plots
plotres(RFDef, which = 3)
plotres(RFDef, which = 4)


#calculate individual ALE
predictor <- Predictor$new(model = RFDef, data = chosen_df, y = "point_valuespk")
effs <- FeatureEffects$new(predictor, grid.size = 10)
plot(effs) + theme_classic()

pred.bike = Predictor$new(RFDef, data = chosen_df, y = "point_valuespk")

# calculate 2nd order ALE
FeatureEffect$new(pred.bike, feature = c(chosen_vars[1], chosen_vars[2]), method = "ale", grid.size = 40)$plot()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = str_wrap("2nd order Accumulated Local Effects", 15))+
  theme_classic()
FeatureEffect$new(pred.bike, feature = c(chosen_vars[1], chosen_vars[3]), method = "ale", grid.size = 40)$plot()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c()+ 
FeatureEffect$new(pred.bike, feature = c(chosen_vars[2], chosen_vars[3]), method = "ale", grid.size = 40)$plot()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c()
```

# Final whole RF, produce outputs for paper
```{r RF just depths}
#remove ID column
all_df <- as.data.frame(depths_hehe) #%>% 

# VSURF routine
iris.learn <- list()
iris.learn$training <- all_df[,-1]
iris.learn$pk <- all_df[,1]

iris.vsurf <- VSURF(x = iris.learn$training, 
                    y = iris.learn$pk, 
                    na.action = na.omit,
                    parallel = TRUE, 
                    ncores = 3, clusterType = "FORK", ntree = 100000)
plot(iris.vsurf)
colnames(iris.learn$training[iris.vsurf$varselect.interp])
colnames(iris.learn$training[iris.vsurf$varselect.pred])


iris.predictions <- predict(iris.vsurf, newdata = iris.learn$training, step = "interp")
#calculate RMSE
tibble(iris.predictions, "actual" = iris.learn$pk) %>% 
  mutate(diff = actual - iris.predictions) %>% 
  summarise(RMSE = sqrt(mean((actual - iris.predictions)^2)))



# subset after VSURF selection routine
chosen_vars <- colnames(iris.learn$training[iris.vsurf$varselect.interp])

chosen_df <- all_df %>% 
  dplyr::select(point_valuespk, chosen_vars)

# Run normal RF and output OOB error, number of variables
RFDef <- randomForest(point_valuespk ~ ., data = chosen_df, na.action = na.omit, ntree = 5000, importance = TRUE)
RFDef
plot(RFDef)

varImpPlot(RFDef, type = 1, scale = TRUE, cex = 0.8, main = "Variable importance")

#plot of partial dependence
imp <- importance(RFDef)
impvar <- rownames(imp)[order(imp[, 1], decreasing=TRUE)]
#impvar1 <- impvar[1:10]
#impvar1 <- colnames(all[vsurfSpam$varselect.pred])
axes_labels <- c("5 m slope",
                 "10 m neighborhood flow acc.",
                 "10 m slope",
                 "100 m WS neighborhood plan curvature",
                 "3 m slope")
impvar <- impvar[1:4]
op <- par(mfrow=c(1, length(impvar)))
for (i in seq_along(impvar)) {
    partialPlot(RFDef, as.data.frame(all_df), impvar[i],
                #main=paste("Partial Dependence on", impvar1[i]),
                main = "",
                cex = 0.1,
                rug = TRUE,
                ylim = c(0.45, 0.65),
                xlab = axes_labels[i])
}
par(op)




# Plot residual plots
plotres(RFDef, which = 3)
plotres(RFDef, which = 4)


#calculate individual ALE
predictor <- Predictor$new(model = RFDef, data = chosen_df, y = "point_valuespk")
effs <- FeatureEffects$new(predictor, grid.size = 10)
p1 <- effs$effects[["nb100m_mean_depth1m"]]$plot() + theme_classic() +
  ylab(y = "ALE on flow persistence prediction")
p2 <- effs$effects[["nb10m_mean_depth1m"]]$plot() + theme_classic()
p3 <- effs$effects[["avgdepth1m_wshed"]]$plot() + theme_classic()
p1 + p2+ p3

pred.bike = Predictor$new(RFDef, data = chosen_df, y = "point_valuespk")

# calculate 2nd order ALE
FeatureEffect$new(pred.bike, feature = c(chosen_vars[1], chosen_vars[2]), method = "ale", grid.size = 40)$plot()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = str_wrap("2nd order Accumulated Local Effects", 15))+
  theme_classic()
FeatureEffect$new(pred.bike, feature = c(chosen_vars[1], chosen_vars[3]), method = "ale", grid.size = 40)$plot()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c()+ 
FeatureEffect$new(pred.bike, feature = c(chosen_vars[2], chosen_vars[3]), method = "ale", grid.size = 40)$plot()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c()
```
```{r RF all variables}
#remove ID column
all_df <- as.data.frame(all_zeros) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-point_valuesID)

# VSURF routine
iris.learn <- list()
iris.learn$training <- all_df[,-1]
iris.learn$pk <- all_df[,1]

iris.vsurf <- VSURF(x = iris.learn$training, 
                    y = iris.learn$pk, 
                    na.action = na.omit,
                    parallel = TRUE, 
                    ncores = 3, clusterType = "FORK", ntree = 100000)
plot(iris.vsurf)
colnames(iris.learn$training[iris.vsurf$varselect.interp])
colnames(iris.learn$training[iris.vsurf$varselect.pred])


iris.predictions <- predict(iris.vsurf, newdata = iris.learn$training, step = "pred")
#calculate RMSE
tibble(iris.predictions, "actual" = iris.learn$pk) %>% 
  mutate(diff = actual - iris.predictions) %>% 
  summarise(RMSE = sqrt(mean((actual - iris.predictions)^2)))



# subset after VSURF selection routine
chosen_vars <- colnames(iris.learn$training[iris.vsurf$varselect.pred])

chosen_df <- all_df %>% 
  dplyr::select(point_valuespk, chosen_vars)

# Run normal RF and output OOB error, number of variables
RFDef <- randomForest(point_valuespk ~ ., data = chosen_df, na.action = na.omit, ntree = 5000, importance = TRUE)
RFDef
plot(RFDef)

varImpPlot(RFDef, type = 1, scale = TRUE, cex = 0.8, main = "Variable importance")


# Plot residual plots
plotres(RFDef, which = 3)
plotres(RFDef, which = 4)


#calculate individual ALE
predictor <- Predictor$new(model = RFDef, data = chosen_df, y = "point_valuespk")
effs <- FeatureEffects$new(predictor, grid.size = 10)
plot(effs) + theme_classic()

p1 <- effs$effects[["point_valuesX5mdem_slope"]]$plot() + theme_classic()
p2 <- effs$effects[["point_valuesX10mdem_slope"]]$plot() + theme_classic() 
p3 <- effs$effects[["point_valuesX5mdem_twi"]]$plot() + theme_classic()
p4 <- effs$effects[["tpi1m_wshed"]]$plot() + theme_classic()
p1 + p2+ p3 + p4

pred.bike = Predictor$new(RFDef, data = chosen_df, y = "point_valuespk")

# calculate 2nd order ALE
FeatureEffect$new(pred.bike, feature = c(chosen_vars[1], chosen_vars[2]), method = "ale", grid.size = 40)$plot()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = str_wrap("2nd order Accumulated Local Effects", 15))+
  theme_classic()
FeatureEffect$new(pred.bike, feature = c(chosen_vars[1], chosen_vars[3]), method = "ale", grid.size = 40)$plot()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c()+ 
FeatureEffect$new(pred.bike, feature = c(chosen_vars[2], chosen_vars[3]), method = "ale", grid.size = 40)$plot()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c()
```






# DEPREC
```{r AGU-talk-just-seismic}

## Plot of just seismic for AGU25 poster
seis_alone <- seis %>% 
group_by(lat, long) %>%       
  #remove duplicate locations by taking the mean
  summarise(mean_depth = mean(depth), n_coords = n()) %>% # n() is for looking duplicate number
  arrange(desc(n_coords)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4329) %>% 
  st_transform(crs1) %>% 
  rename(depth = mean_depth) %>% 
  mutate(source = "seismic")

ggplot()+
  theme_void()+
  # geom_spatraster(data = rast(hillshade_location))+
  # #theme(legend.position = "")+
  # scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("gray9", "gray48","lightgray", "white"),
  #                      na.value = "transparent",
  #                      guide = "none")+
  #   new_scale_fill() +
  geom_sf(data = w3_outline, color = "grey", fill = NA, alpha = 0.3, lwd = 2)+
  geom_sf(data = w3_stream, colour = "#9AC0CD", lwd = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = seis_alone, aes(fill = depth), size = 2, pch = 21) +
  
  # scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma",#high = "#27408B", low = "white",
  #                     name = "Depth (m)")+
  scale_fill_continuous(high = "purple4", low = "white",
                      name = "Depth (m)")+
  #facet_wrap(~source, ncol= 4)+
  theme_classic()+
  #geom_sf(data = w3_pour, colour = "black") +
   #scale_fill_hypso_c(palette = "dem_screen" , limits = c(200, 1000))+
  theme(rect = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "left")
```

```{r orginal krig chunk}
# # chunk that will run the variogram calculation and run kriging model
# 
# # create the empty grid to hold the output of kriging
# st_bbox(w3_outline) |>
#   st_as_stars(dx = 1) -> grd
# 
# #grd <- mask_dem
# 
# # Remove empty geometries
# which(st_is_empty(all_sources))
# all_sources <- all_sources[-which(st_is_empty(all_sources)),]
# # Remove missing depth values, all 3 are in auger dataset
# which(is.na(all_sources))
# all_sources <-all_sources[-which(is.na(all_sources)),]
# 
# no_auger <- filter(all_sources, source != "2019_auger")
# 
# # calculate the sample variogram
# v <- variogram(depth~1, no_auger)
# #v <- variogram(depth~1, all_sources, cutoff = 445.8491, width = 37.15409)
# 
# # plot semivariogram
# plot(v, plot.numbers = TRUE, xlab = "distance h [m]",
#      ylab = expression(gamma(h)),
#      xlim = c(0, 1.055 * max(v$dist)))
# 
# # fit a model/variogram to the data
# v.m <- fit.variogram(v, vgm(1, "Exp", 10, 1))
# plot(v, v.m, plot.numbers = TRUE, xlab = "distance h [m]",
#      ylab = expression(gamma(h)),
#      xlim = c(0, 1.055 * max(v$dist))) ## draws a single model; draw 2 models in single plot:
# # use variogram model to krig
```
